executive_summary: Build failure analysis for attempt 3 reveals persistent compilation errors in Maven build process. Previous fixes addressed 6 missing @Builder annotations on DTO classes, but the build continues to fail with action run 22752520662. The errors are primarily COMPILATION_ERROR category related to Lombok annotation processing and builder pattern usage in service and test classes.

errors.title: Missing @Builder annotation on ApplyCouponRequest DTO
errors.description: The ApplyCouponRequest class is missing the @Builder annotation, causing compilation failures when builder pattern is used in test classes.
errors.error_message: cannot find symbol: method builder() in class ApplyCouponRequest
errors.root_cause: Lombok @Builder annotation not present on DTO class that uses builder pattern in dependent code
errors.impact: Prevents compilation of test classes that instantiate ApplyCouponRequest using builder pattern

errors.title: Missing @Builder annotation on CartItem DTO
errors.description: The CartItem class is missing the @Builder annotation, causing compilation failures in CartServiceImpl.
errors.error_message: cannot find symbol: method builder() in class CartItem
errors.root_cause: Lombok @Builder annotation not present on DTO class used in service layer with builder pattern
errors.impact: Prevents compilation of CartServiceImpl that creates CartItem instances using builder pattern

errors.title: Missing @Builder annotation on CartResponse DTO
errors.description: The CartResponse class is missing the @Builder annotation, causing compilation failures in CartServiceImpl.toCartResponse() method.
errors.error_message: cannot find symbol: method builder() in class CartResponse
errors.root_cause: Lombok @Builder annotation not present on DTO class used in service layer transformation methods
errors.impact: Prevents compilation of CartServiceImpl.toCartResponse() method that constructs CartResponse using builder pattern

errors.title: Missing @Builder annotation on ErrorDetail DTO
errors.description: The ErrorDetail class is missing the @Builder annotation, causing compilation failures in GlobalExceptionHandler.
errors.error_message: cannot find symbol: method builder() in class ErrorDetail
errors.root_cause: Lombok @Builder annotation not present on DTO class used in exception handling with builder pattern
errors.impact: Prevents compilation of GlobalExceptionHandler that creates ErrorDetail instances using builder pattern

errors.title: Missing @Builder annotation and constructor conflict on ErrorResponse DTO
errors.description: The ErrorResponse class is missing the @Builder annotation and has a custom constructor that conflicts with Lombok annotations, causing compilation failures in GlobalExceptionHandler.
errors.error_message: cannot find symbol: method builder() in class ErrorResponse; constructor ErrorResponse conflicts with Lombok generated constructor
errors.root_cause: Lombok @Builder annotation not present and custom constructor conflicts with @AllArgsConstructor annotation
errors.impact: Prevents compilation of GlobalExceptionHandler that creates ErrorResponse instances using builder pattern

errors.title: Missing @Builder annotation on ValidateCouponRequest DTO
errors.description: The ValidateCouponRequest class is missing the @Builder annotation, causing compilation failures in CouponControllerTest.
errors.error_message: cannot find symbol: method builder() in class ValidateCouponRequest
errors.root_cause: Lombok @Builder annotation not present on DTO class used in test classes with builder pattern
errors.impact: Prevents compilation of CouponControllerTest that instantiates ValidateCouponRequest using builder pattern

errors.title: Potential Maven annotation processor configuration issue
errors.description: Maven compiler plugin may not be properly configured to process Lombok annotations during compilation phase.
errors.error_message: Lombok annotations not being processed correctly during Maven compile phase
errors.root_cause: Maven compiler plugin annotation processor path may need explicit Lombok dependency configuration
errors.impact: May cause intermittent compilation failures even after adding @Builder annotations if annotation processing is not configured correctly

remediation_recommendations.action: Verify all @Builder annotations were successfully added to DTO classes in previous fix attempt
remediation_recommendations.rationale: Build continues to fail after fixes were applied, suggesting annotations may not have been committed correctly

remediation_recommendations.action: Check Maven compiler plugin configuration for Lombok annotation processor
remediation_recommendations.rationale: Ensure annotation processing is enabled and Lombok is in the annotation processor path

remediation_recommendations.action: Verify Lombok dependency version compatibility with Java version
remediation_recommendations.rationale: Incompatible Lombok version may cause annotation processing failures

remediation_recommendations.action: Review build logs for additional compilation errors not captured in previous analysis
remediation_recommendations.rationale: There may be cascading errors or additional issues not yet identified
